text.title: QA Session-Based Test Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are we running uncharted exploratory testing on a non-trivial UI feature?

text.example: Charter: 'Explore admin bulk role-edit flow'. 90-min session by alice. T=60% B=25% S=15%. Findings: 3 bugs (one S2, two S3), 1 issue (filter architecture question), 2 tasks (docs missing). Debrief: filter inconsistency likely root cause of S2; recommend separate session. Report committed to release/v2.4/sbtm-2026-05-23-001.json.
